scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/*/dist packages/*/dist apps/web/.next test-results playwright-report coverage
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @worlddock/db prisma:validate && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm --filter @worlddock/db prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @worlddock/db prisma:validate && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @worlddock/api test:integration && pnpm --filter @worlddock/web test:e2e
